audio_ic.name: Audio IC (Codec Chip)
audio_ic.note: BGA chip on logic board. Common failure on iPhone 7/7+ (loop disease). Requires microsoldering.

baseband_modem.name: Baseband Modem (Cellular)
baseband_modem.note: BGA modem IC. Failure causes 'No Service' or 'Searching'. Board-level repair.

tristar_ic.name: Tristar / Hydra IC (USB Controller)
tristar_ic.note: Controls USB data/charging negotiation. Failure causes charging issues, false moisture warnings, or boot loops.

truedepth_camera.name: TrueDepth Camera System (Face ID)
truedepth_camera.note: Paired to logic board. Apple-only replacement restores Face ID. Third-party replacement loses Face ID.

nfc_chip.name: NFC Controller
nfc_chip.note: NXP NFC controller on logic board. Failure breaks Apple Pay and Express Transit.

uwb_chip.name: Ultra Wideband (U1/U2) Chip
uwb_chip.note: Apple-designed UWB chip. Board swap or Apple repair required.

camera_system.name: Camera System (Rear/Front)
camera_system.note: Camera modules are replaceable. ISP is part of SoC (not repairable).

pmu_ic.name: Power Management IC (PMIC)
pmu_ic.note: Main power management chip. Failure causes no power, random shutdowns, or boot loops. Complex BGA rework.

backlight_ic.name: Backlight Driver IC
backlight_ic.note: Controls display backlight. Common failure on iPhone 8/X+ after screen replacement without disconnecting battery. Filter/IC replacement.

gps_antenna.name: GPS Antenna & Module
gps_antenna.note: GPS antenna is usually on a flex cable. Connector or antenna damage causes location drift.

soc_gpu.name: System on Chip (GPU)
soc_gpu.note: Part of SoC package. Board swap required.

memory_nand.name: RAM / NAND Storage
memory_nand.note: NAND can be swapped by expert. RAM is part of SoC (not repairable).

secure_enclave.name: Secure Enclave Processor
secure_enclave.note: Fused to SoC. Board swap required. Paired to device.

thermal_system.name: Thermal Monitoring System
thermal_system.note: Depends on which sensor. Usually on a flex cable.

logic_board.name: Logic Board (Motherboard)
logic_board.note: Full board replacement. Last resort when specific IC cannot be identified or multiple failures present.
